title: CreateNoteRequest
description: Payload to create a new wiki note.

language.description: Language of the note. Determines title-index extraction strategy.

title.description: Unique title of the note. Used as the URL path segment.

content.description: Full Markdown content of the note.
content.example:
# Getting Started

Welcome to the wiki.

accessLevel.description: Who can read this note. PUBLIC: anyone; RESTRICTED: authenticated users; PRIVATE: author only.

status.description: Publication status. DRAFT notes are visible only to the author.

summary.description: Optional short description of the change for audit purposes.
